---
title: "Grads"
output:
  quarto::bookdown_html:
    css: style.css
---

<div class="image-grid">
  <figure>
    <img src="images/grads/0D6B6A6D-A191-4E01-AD5E-16ADDD4CDD56-3A9875FD-6CD5-4F8B-89A9-BBA56B045C9D.jpg" width="500">
  </figure>
 
  <figure>
    <img src="images/grads/DSC_2044.jpg" width="500">
  </figure>
</div>
